default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss business performance, marketing initiatives, and strategic priorities](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Inbound deal sizes have dropped significantly (40% lower ASP) compared to last quarter, impacting pipeline targets](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Need to focus on landing larger, strategic deals (e.g. $1M+) to make the business model work](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Team is spread thin across too many initiatives, need to prioritize and focus efforts](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Upcoming product announcements and marketing pushes require clear narrative and demos](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Business Performance and Deal Sizes

  - [Inbound average deal size dropped from $26K to $16K (40% decrease) from Q1 to Q2](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Outbound average deal size dropped from $26K to $20K (20% decrease)](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [This is causing pipeline to be much lower than $7M target at \~$4.4M](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Need to figure out how to land more $1M+ strategic deals for the math to work](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)

### Marketing Initiatives and Prioritization

  - [Team is spread thin across too many initiatives (website updates, announcements, events, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Need to prioritize most impactful 2-3 things and ignore others for now](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Upcoming announcements on June 3rd require clear narrative and product demos](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Product Vision and Differentiation

  - [Discussed creating short video clips highlighting unique AI audio capabilities (far-field, multi-language, real-time context, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Can use these to internally align on vision and differentiation before marketing externally](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [Need to determine which specific capabilities to showcase for June 3rd announcements](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel, Natalie, and Scott to sync on narrative for June 3rd video shoot](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [Product team to focus on curating perfect product demos by Thursday for Scott's practice](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Marketing team to handle logistics (travel, equipment, script, etc.) for video shoot](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
  - [Anoop to connect with Natalie on developing product vision video highlighting key differentiators](https://fathom.video/share/VwEvUchPcte66FvxW2ARmRVi49V12YE8?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)

action_items.description: Have a sync meeting to discuss narrative for investor pitch
Review Scott's order taking video and provide feedback
Determine clips and data needed to develop audio AI demo examples
Focus on narrative and logistics for June 3rd video shoot
Develop demos for June 3rd video shoot
Work together to develop vision for audio AI capabilities and demo examples
